signal.author: Mr Flathead Fishing Charters Tasmania
signal.title: (2) Paul and his son Ziggy had... - Mr Flathead Fishing Charters Tasmania | Facebook
signal.raw_excerpt:
Paul and his son Ziggy had Bluefin Tuna locked in as our target for the day. Fortunately we came across the motherload! From zero to 100 we had Tuna boiling and birds diving. Multiple double hookup and chaos! The odds were against us with rough weather and seals galore but managed to get a couple past our fury friends. Ziggy boated a ripper estimated 70kg+ Bluefin!
查看翻译

signal.title: (2) The rain did not put a... - Mr Flathead Fishing Charters Tasmania | Facebook
signal.raw_excerpt:
The rain did not put a dampener on todays charter! Repeat customer Ashley and crew got their bag of Perch mixed in with a stray yellow tail kingfish on the bottom rig for something different. Finished off with a few ripper striped trumpeter. Thanks heaps for today guys!
